title: Gym and Tonic
hero_subtitle: Join Gym and Tonic and transform your fitness journey
intro_text: From weightlifting to yoga, our expert trainers guide you every step of the way. Whether you want to tone up, build strength, or improve flexibility, Gym and Tonic has a plan for you.
newsletter.title: Stay in the Loop
newsletter.subtitle: Get exclusive offers — don’t let your gains slip away!
coach1_desc: Master of iron and grit, John will push your limits with weights while keeping a smile on your face. Price: $50/session.
coach2_desc: High-energy HIIT and cardio queen, Lisa makes you sweat while teaching you to fly. Price: $45/session.
coach3_desc: From downward dogs to backbends, Maya helps your body flow with ease and mindfulness. Price: $40/session.
feature1_desc: Pump iron like a champ! From barbells to dumbbells, lift your spirits and your gains—no pain, no champagne.
feature2_desc: We tailor each rep and set to your body, turning sweat into gold. Remember: Rome wasn't built in a day, but you’ll feel stronger every session!
feature3_desc: Eat smart, lift smarter! Our nutrition tips ensure you don't just train hard, you fuel smart—because abs are made in the kitchen too.
about_text: Gym and Tonic is dedicated to helping you achieve your fitness goals. Our expert trainers, state-of-the-art facilities, and personalized programs make fitness fun, effective, and safe. Whether you’re a beginner or a seasoned athlete, we have something for everyone.
contact_text: Have questions or want to book a session? Fill out the form below, and our team will respond promptly.
contact.name: John Doe
